title: Tender Management System
desc:
I run a system-integration business and need a complete tracking system built from
scratch in Microsoft 365 (SharePoint Online + Power Automate) to manage our
Tenders, Procurement (Purchase Orders) and Deliveries — replacing spreadsheets.

BUILD FROM SCRATCH — full scope:
1. SharePoint site + 7 lists with all columns, choices and lookup relationships:
   Tenders, Tender Checklist, Projects, Purchase Orders, Vendor Enquiries,
   Deliveries, Stakeholders. (Full schema provided in the attached document.)
2. List views + Stage colour-formatting (Active Pipeline, Overdue, Awaiting
   Delivery, Delayed, Follow-ups Due).
3. Daily 08:00 IST status email to stakeholders — OVERDUE and DUE-TODAY items
   across Tenders, POs and Deliveries (HTML tables + counts).
4. Reminder flows: tender/PO deadline reminders (3 & 1 day prior), EMD/BG expiry
   reminder, delivery follow-up nudge, pending-approval nudge.
5. A simple SharePoint dashboard page (native web parts — no Power BI).
6. Test with sample data, then hand over + a short how-to.

CONSTRAINTS:
- Microsoft 365 E3 — STANDARD Power Automate connectors only (no premium/HTTP/
  Dataverse, no Power BI). Time zone Asia/Kolkata (IST). Currency INR.

I will provide a DETAILED build document with the exact list schema, column names,
all filter/expression logic and the email design — so this is mostly
implementation, not design. Build in MY tenant; access via screen-share or a
guest/edit account.

title: Expert Vehicle Dealer Account Manager Needed
desc:
i operate a busy buy-and-sell car business and I need an experienced accounts manager who can keep our books current each day. You may work in QuickBooks, Xero, Zoho Books, or any other modern platform you feel is the best fit—what matters most is that the data is clean, timely, and ready when I need it.

Day-to-day you’ll take ownership of:
• Posting every purchase and sale the same day it happens, matching invoices with payments and reconciling against bank feeds.
• Tracking all operating expenses and recording revenue so I can see real-time profitability on each vehicle and on the business as a whole.
• Running payroll for a small team, ensuring taxes and withholdings are handled correctly.

I expect a concise daily summary or dashboard that highlights cash position, outstanding invoices, and any anomalies that need my attention. Accuracy is critical—vehicle margins are tight, so I need absolute confidence in the numbers before I commit new capital.

If you’ve previously managed books for dealerships, trade businesses, or inventory-heavy operations, please mention it. Let me know which software you recommend, how you’ll structure our chart of accounts around stock vehicles, and the earliest date you could start.

title: Meta Ads Donation Campaign Specialist
desc:
I run a Section 8 nonprofit and I’m ready to scale our general-fund donations through Meta. My immediate need is an expert who has already driven significant results for NGOs on both Facebook and Instagram and who knows Meta’s fundraising tools and policy nuances inside out.

Here’s what I’m looking for: build and optimize high-converting campaigns aimed at cold, warm, and retargeted audiences; structure ad sets for efficient testing; and continuously refine creative, copy, and placements so we maximise donations without inflating cost-per-acquisition. Full compliance with Meta’s charitable advertising guidelines is essential.

Please highlight your relevant experience with donation or nonprofit campaigns—screenshots, ROAS figures, or brief case notes are welcome. I’ll share existing assets, past performance data, and pixel access once we agree to proceed, and I’d like transparent weekly reporting so we can quickly spot opportunities and scale what works.

If you’ve repeatedly turned social traffic into reliable donor revenue, I’d love to collaborate.

title: Remote SaaS Sales to UAE Doctors
desc:
I run a specialised SaaS platform built for doctors practicing in the UAE and I’m ready to accelerate sign-ups. I’m looking for a sales and demo specialist who can work 100 % remotely yet operate as if you were right here in Dubai’s clinics and hospitals.  

What I need you to own from day one:  
• Converting warm, marketing-qualified leads through personable, high-energy calls.  
• Crafting concise email sequences and timely follow-ups that keep prospects moving.  
• Scheduling and delivering screen-share demos that translate product features into clear value.  
• Closing the deal, logging every touch-point in a CRM and reporting weekly on momentum.  

Because our buyers are physicians, prior remote sales success with any doctor-facing digital solution is essential. If you already know the rhythm of a busy practice and can speak credibly about workflow, compliance and data security, you will hit the ground running.  

Our marketing team will supply the lead lists. You will create your pitch deck and the tech team will provide a demo environment and CRM access. You bring a reliable headset, a calm on-camera presence and the discipline to hit agreed conversion targets without daily supervision.  

Once onboard, we’ll define KPI-linked milestones—typically call volume, demo bookings and closed subscriptions—so your effort and payout stay perfectly aligned. If this sounds like a familiar playbook you’ve executed before, let’s talk and get you closing our next cohort of UAE docto

title: Odoo Sales & Inventory Customization
desc:
I already have Odoo up and running and now need the Sales and Inventory modules tailored to fit our day-to-day processes more tightly.  

Sales  
• Custom reports – I want clear, print-ready reports for quotations, orders, and invoices that match our branding and highlight margins at line level.  
• Workflow modifications – the default quotation → order → invoice flow must include an internal approval step and automatic email notifications at each stage.  

Inventory  
• Warehouse management changes – streamline put-away and picking rules so stock is routed automatically between two warehouses and one dropship location.  
• Stock tracking adjustments – tighter lot/serial tracking with automatic expiration alerts and an easier way to reconcile physical counts.  

Deliverables will be accepted once the new reports render from the standard menus, every adjusted workflow completes without errors, and inventory moves show the correct routing and traceability on test data. Please work directly on a staging copy (SSH access provided) and document every change so I can reproduce it in production.

title: DELL Tower PC Repair & Replacement
desc:
My DELL tower PC powers on for a few seconds and then stops. I'm looking for someone to:

- Diagnose and fix the current issue.
- Supply a suitable replacement if needed.
- Transfer data from the old machine to the new one.

Ideal skills and experience:

- Proficiency in PC hardware troubleshooting and repair
- Experience with data transfer between systems
- Ability to recommend and supply compatible replacement PCs

Please include any relevant experience in your bid.

title: Full-Stack Marketer
desc:
I need an experienced full-stack marketer to take our health-tech product in the UAE from “interesting idea” to a steady flow of qualified doctor leads. The work revolves around lead generation and measurable conversions, not just impressions or vanity metrics. We want to focus primarily on organic and content marketing + SEO/GEO/AEO with some performance marketing. We prefer someone who has previous experience of marketing TO doctors. This is a monthly recurring job with a fixed monthly fee and not a one-off project.

Here is the current mix I want perfected: we already have basic Facebook, Instagram and LinkedIn pages live, plus a small email list and a handful of search ads. I need you to build a cohesive marketing funnel—content and creative that resonates with physicians, segmented email sequences that nurture them through the decision cycle, and social/Search campaigns that continually replenish the pipeline.  

You should be comfortable planning strategy, building assets yourself (or directing a designer), launching and optimising campaigns, and reporting on performance in a way the leadership team can act on quickly. You are also a content expert defining and implementing a content strategy that not only builds awareness but also thought leadership and loyalty for the brand. HubSpot (or a comparable CRM), Meta Ads Manager, LinkedIn Campaign Manager, Google Ads and a solid email automation platform will likely be your daily toolkit, so hands-on proficiency is essential

title: E-Commerce Copy Bidding Script
desc:
I write website copy for online stores and now want a concise, persuasive bidding script that helps me secure more e-commerce projects on this platform. The goal is a reusable template I can personalise in minutes while still sounding tailored to each prospect.

What the script must do  
• Address e-commerce decision-makers and highlight conversion benefits, SEO alignment and brand voice consistency.  
• Cover core website sections—home, category, product, about, FAQ—so I can reference any or all of them depending on the brief.  
• Stay under 250 words once customised and flow naturally with zero filler.  
• Include smart placeholders (e.g. {StoreName}, {TopProduct}, {PastResult%}) for rapid editing, plus optional lines for upselling email or ad copy.

Deliverables  
1. Master bidding script in an editable Google Doc (or Word) with clearly marked placeholders.  
2. One-page usage guide explaining how to adapt tone, length and calls-to-action for different niches or client personalities.

Acceptance criteria  
– Reads smoothly after placeholder replacement, without generic wording.  
– Demonstrates my expertise in copywriting, specific wins, and direct value to an online retailer.  
– Avoids hype; focuses on measurable outcomes and a friendly, confident voice.

If you need extra context about my past projects or favourite writing tools, let me know before starting so the final script lands perfectly.

title: Ortodoncista remoto para Titán
desc:
Trabajo con varias clínicas dentales que utilizan la plataforma Titán y necesito apoyo continuo de un ortodoncista con experiencia en la planificación digital.  

Qué espero de ti  
• Planificar casos simples y complejos en Titán: recibirás radiografías, escaneos y la historia clínica; devuélveme la propuesta de tratamiento con sus etapas y tiempos estimados.  
• Consultas en línea: coordinar videollamadas para revisar ajustes, resolver dudas del equipo clínico y validar la evolución de cada paciente.  
• Comunicación fluida: utilizamos Zoom, Google Meet y chat interno, por lo que debes sentirte cómodo con estas herramientas.  

Flujo de trabajo  
1. Te comparto los archivos del paciente y la fecha límite.  
2. En 24-48 h entregas el plan preliminar.  
3. Ajustamos en conjunto y emitimos el plan final que la clínica aplicará.  
4. Seguimiento mensual breve por videollamada según la complejidad del caso.  

Lo que valoro  
– Dominio demostrado de Titán.  
– Experiencia clínica real en ortodoncia.  
– Disponibilidad flexible para responder dentro del horario laboral de Latinoamérica.  
– Capacidad para documentar cada decisión en lenguaje claro para el odontólogo general.  

Si te interesa colaborar a largo plazo con un flujo constante de casos, cuéntame tu experiencia relevante y tu disponibilidad semanal. Espero trabajar contigo pronto.

title: Creador/a de vídeos con IA para canal de finanzas e inversión en TikTok (español)
desc:
CONTEXTO
Gestionamos un canal de análisis financiero (acciones, cripto, economía) con
comunidad activa en Telegram. Buscamos lanzar un canal de TikTok con
contenido divulgativo sobre mercados, con identidad propia y un avatar
de IA reconocible, sin vincularse a una cara pública concreta.

QUÉ NECESITAMOS
- 2 vídeos por semana para TikTok, guion + producción con IA.
- Creación de un avatar de IA propio y coherente en el tiempo (misma
  "cara"/voz en todos los vídeos), que sirva como imagen de marca del canal.
- Nosotros aportamos los temas/análisis de base; el freelance adapta
  el guion a formato TikTok (gancho, ritmo, subtítulos).

REQUISITOS IMPRESCINDIBLES
- Español nativo (indistinto España/Latinoamérica).
- Experiencia demostrable en el sector financiero/inversión: se requiere
  portfolio con al menos 2 clientes de este sector (no vale contenido
  genérico de UGC sin esta especialización).
- Experiencia previa creando avatares de IA (HeyGen, Synthesia, Captions,
  Arcads u otra herramienta equivalente).
- Disponibilidad de entrega semanal constante.

CONDICIONES SOBRE EL AVATAR (imprescindible aceptar)
- El avatar (imagen y voz) se crea en exclusiva para nuestra marca: no podrá
  reutilizarse, licenciarse ni ofrecerse a ningún otro cliente.
- Cedemos a cambio del pago acordado el uso exclusivo y la explotación
  comercial del avatar en todos los formatos y plataformas donde publiquemos
  contenido.
- Si el avatar se genera con una herramienta de terceros (HeyGen, Synthes

title: 2-Minute Movie Trailer & Credits
desc:
I need a polished two-minute trailer and a matching end-credit roll for my independent movie. You will work with the footage and artwork I supply, cut a tight, story-driven trailer, balance the audio, add music and SFX where needed, and then build a clean rolling credit sequence that feels consistent with the trailer’s look.

I’m comfortable if you handle the edit in Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut; motion graphics can live in After Effects or the equivalent. Just be sure the final files come back to me in 4K ProRes plus an H.264 web version, along with all project files and fonts so I can revise later if required.

Total compensation is capped at $160, paid on final delivery once I’ve confirmed:

• Trailer runs 1 min 55 – 2 min 00  
• Music/SFX are royalty-free and cleared  
• Credits scroll smoothly, free of typos, and match brand colours & typography  

If that scope and rate work for you, let’s get rolling—footage is ready to transfer immediately.

title: SAP ABAP OO Developer Required
desc:
Experience: 10–15 Years

Contract Duration: 6 Months

*Job Description: Senior Technical SAP ABAP OO Developer*

*Required Skills and Experience:*
10–15 years of hands-on SAP technical development experience in SAP ECC and SAP S/4HANA environments.
Strong expertise in SAP ABAP and OOABAP development.
Extensive experience with SAP RAP (RESTful Application Programming Model).
Strong hands-on experience with CDS Views, BOPF, and SAP OData Services (V2 & V4).
Experience designing, developing, and enhancing SAP technical solutions using ABAP, OOABAP, CDS Views, BOPF, and SAP RAP in SAP S/4HANA, SAP Implementations
Expertise in developing custom programs, reports, classes, function modules, and reusable technical components.
Strong experience with SAP enhancements including BADIs, User Exits, Enhancement Spots, and Implicit/Explicit Enhancements.
Hands-on experience developing and maintaining SAP OData Services and backend logic for applications and API enablement.
Strong knowledge of designing and optimizing CDS Views, associations, annotations, and data models for transactional and analytical requirements.
Experience developing interfaces using IDocs, BAPIs, RFCs, Proxy Objects, SOAP, and REST Web Services.
Expertise in Adobe Forms, Smart Forms, and SAP Script development for business documents and outputs.
Strong debugging, root cause analysis, and troubleshooting skills across custom and standard SAP objects.
Experience developing workflows, interfaces, forms, and RAP-based app

title: High-End Wedding Video Close-Up Edit
desc:
I have raw wedding footage ready and need it transformed into a cinematic film that celebrates intimate moments. The brief is straightforward: keep the storytelling tight, lean heavily on close-up shots, and weave in tasteful slow-motion sequences wherever emotion peaks—vows, first look, the aisle walk, and other key highlights.

All original clips will be shared via a cloud drive. Once you receive them, please:

• Sort and select the strongest close-ups first; supporting angles can follow only if they enhance the flow.  
• Apply slow motion with smooth frame blending so motion stays crisp and natural.  
• Balance audio levels and ensure dialogue remains clear over background music.  
• Deliver a final master file in 4K (H.264) plus a web-ready 1080p version.

I cut my own travel and crowd shots, so focus purely on the intimate storytelling pieces. If you prefer Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve, that’s fine—just maintain professional color consistency straight from camera; no heavy grading is needed.

Acceptance criteria:
– Narrative built primarily from close-ups.  
– Slow-motion sequences free of jitter or ghosting.  
– Seamless audio transitions without abrupt fades or pops.  
– Final runtime between 5–7 minutes unless you advise otherwise.

Let me know your turnaround time and any questions once you’ve reviewed the footage folder.

title: B Corp Certification Consultation Needed
desc:
I’m ready to start our B Corp journey and need an experienced advisor who can walk me through the certification requirements. My priority is understanding how our social and environmental performance will be scored so I can close any gaps before we submit the B Impact Assessment.

This engagement will be carried out entirely through remote consultations using Zoom, Google Meet, or a comparable platform. I’d like a series of focused sessions that:

• Explain the scoring methodology for the Social and Environmental sections of the B Impact Assessment.  
• Review our current policies, metrics, and data collection processes.  
• Produce a concise action plan outlining the improvements, documentation, and timelines needed to hit the minimum 80-point threshold.

We’ll schedule sessions in blocks that make sense for you, but I’m aiming to have the initial gap analysis and roadmap completed within four weeks. If you have direct experience guiding companies through successful B Corp applications—and can provide examples—I’d love to hear how you can help.

title: Software Tester Without Experience Needed
desc:
We develop our own software for medical consultations. It needs to be tested periodically according to different parameters and options. That's why we are looking for a female Tester. To help us do this, first you will need to take part in one of the scientific and medical researches with a help of our specialists and software:

1. General medical examination
2. Reaction test (will need the help of a friend)
3. Extreme variant

This means that you must be prepared for all the relevant nuances of the chosen variant. Thus, our software will determine if your body type and data is suitable for further interaction. Work experience is not required, but it is important to show attentiveness and interest in the project. If you are approved, testing sessions will take place twice a week.

IMPORTANT: Special education is not required!

title: Tower Crane Tie Validation
desc:
I have already modelled and drafted the tie-in system for three tower cranes and produced the accompanying shop drawings. What I now require is a seasoned structural engineer to give the study a thorough check, close any technical gaps, and issue the final documents I can submit to the client and the site team.

Scope of the review  
The core of the assignment is to validate every structural aspect of the ties—confirming the load paths, verifying the adequacy of each tie-in point on the building, and checking that the material selections and grades match both code and manufacturer limits. My existing shop drawings, connection details, and preliminary notes will be at your disposal from day one.

Deliverables  
• Signed and referenced load calculations (crane and building actions, wind, accidental loads, safety factors, etc.)  
• Mark-ups or red-lined comments on the current shop drawings highlighting any required changes to tie-in points  
• Updated, clean set of shop drawings incorporating those changes (DWG and PDF)  
• Brief material specification table confirming steel grades, bolts, welding and any protective coatings  
• Short validation memo summarising assumptions, standards followed, and conclusions

Acceptance criteria  
All calculations must comply with the governing code we agree on (EN 1993 / AISC / local standard) and clearly reference manufacturer data. Drawings should be build-ready, free of clashes, and formatted to the title block template I provide.

Timeli

title: B2B Lead Generation: 4000 Luxury Hotels (16000 Verified Emails and LinkedIn)
desc:
We are looking for a highly accurate B2B Lead Generation and Data Mining specialist to compile a premium global database of exactly 4,000 luxury properties. This is a milestone-based project with a strict quality-control protocol.

TARGET CRITERIA:The database must exclusively feature 5-Star Luxury Hotels, Mega-Resorts, and Casino Hotels worldwide that have dedicated live entertainment facilities, show lounges, performance stages, or ballrooms for long-term live music contracts. Absolutely NO quiet piano bars, and NO standard business/convention hotels.

GLOBAL DISTRIBUTION (4,000 TOTAL ROWS - BALANCED COUNTRY MIX):The list must be balanced evenly across 4 continents (Exactly 1,000 hotels per block, well-distributed among the following specific countries):

-1,000 Europe: Italy, Spain, France, Germany, Greece, Portugal, United Kingdom, Switzerland, Austria, Monaco, Malta, Cyprus, Croatia, Slovenia, Poland, Netherlands, Belgium, Turkey.

-1,000 Asia & Middle East: United Arab Emirates (Dubai, Abu Dhabi), Qatar, Oman, Saudi Arabia, Thailand, Indonesia (Bali), Singapore, Malaysia, Vietnam, Japan, South Korea, Maldives, Macao, Hong Kong, Philippines.

- 1,000 The Americas & Caribbean: United States (Las Vegas, Miami, California, Hawaii), Mexico, Bahamas, Jamaica, Aruba, Dominican Republic, Cayman Islands, Puerto Rico, St. Lucia, Barbados, Turks and Caicos, Brazil, Argentina, Colombia.

- 1,000 Africa: Egypt, Morocco, Tunisia, South Africa, Seychelles, Mauritius, Kenya, Tanzania (

title: SAP E2E Testing Strategy - SAP BDC  SAP BTP
desc:
I need a clear, actionable approach that will let my team validate our end-to-end business processes in SAP before we hit the critical go-live window. The strategy must cover every environment we will test in, outline the pre-requisites for each, map cross-system dependencies, spell out data requirements, and lock down timelines—we are ready to move forward ASAP.

While the exact functional scope is still being finalised, the plan should anticipate commonly integrated areas such as Finance (FI), Materials Management (MM) and Sales & Distribution (SD) so that adding or removing a module later is straightforward. Please weave proven practices from tools you know well—SAP Solution Manager, HP ALM, Jira, or similar—into the methodology where they make sense.

Deliverables  
• A concise test-strategy document detailing objectives, environment architecture and governance  
• Dependency matrix showing interfaces, cut-over impacts and sequence constraints  
• Data management plan covering master, transactional and anonymised test data sets  
• Gantt-style timeline with milestones, entry/exit criteria and resource touchpoints  
• Risk log with mitigation tactics tied back to each dependency or data constraint  

I’m looking for a consultant who can keep the narrative tight, the templates practical, and who can turn this around quickly without sacrificing clarity.

title: Precise Excel Data Entry Needed
desc:
I need to move roughly 500 – 1,000 rows of mixed text and numerical data out of several PDF reports and into an Excel file that follows a template I will supply (fixed columns, headers, number formats, etc.). Accuracy is absolutely critical—there is zero tolerance for typos, misplaced decimals, or shifted rows—so every entry must be double-checked before you send the final workbook back to me.  

You will work only with PDF files, and the information is confidential, so please handle all documents responsibly and agree to delete them once the job is closed. Turnaround time is 3–5 days from the moment I share the files.

To succeed you’ll need to be comfortable with:  
• Sorting large tables quickly  
• Applying consistent formatting across columns and rows  
• Using simple formulas such as SUM and VLOOKUP to cross-verify totals  

When you bid, include samples of past data-entry work that demonstrate accuracy and presentation quality, along with your current typing speed and error rate. The sole deliverable is the completed Excel workbook, fully validated and ready for immediate use.

title: Pakistani UGC Chatbot Tutorial Video
desc:
I’ve just launched a conversational AI platform and am looking for a Pakistani video influencer to create a series of promotional and tutorial videos that show people how simple and powerful the platform is.

The primary goal is lead generation, so each video should encourage viewers to sign up through a tracked link.

Content would include:

* A few short promotional videos highlighting the platform’s benefits and use cases
* A few tutorial/how-to videos showing viewers how to create an account, build their first bot, and test it through a live chat

Key features to highlight:

* Ease of use: no coding, clean interface, and ready-made templates
* Advanced AI: natural-language understanding, contextual memory, and multilingual responses

Deliverables:

* Several 1–3 minute HD promotional and tutorial videos published on your YouTube, TikTok, or Instagram channels
* Clear on-screen and verbal calls to action
* Raw video files for use in ads and other marketing
* Captions containing our tracking URL and two branded hashtags
* Basic performance statistics after one week, including views, likes, and link clicks

If your audience is primarily based in Pakistan and you’re comfortable presenting in English, Urdu, or a mix of both, I’d love to collaborate. Please share your channel links, typical view counts, pricing, and how soon you could begin publishing the videos.

We are also open to collaborations such as posting on your channel to promote the product.

This project is for 1-3

title: 2D Comedy Cartoon Series Animator Needed
desc:
Project Title:
Looking for 2D Hand-Drawn Cartoon Animator (Comedy Series)

Project Description:

I'm looking for a skilled 2D animator or a small animation team to create an ongoing series of original comedy cartoons inspired by the animation style of channels like Not Your Type and HardToonz (style reference only, not copies).

The cartoons are aimed at teens and adults and will feature comedy, satire, and occasional dark humor.

Scope of Work:
• Script writing
• Storyboarding
• Character & background design
• Hand-drawn / frame-by-frame 2D animation
• Human voice acting (Hindi, English, or Hinglish)
• Sound effects & background music
• Final editing and rendering

If you work with a team to cover these skills, that's perfectly fine.

Reference Style:
https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Fe4X3gDGkGoauK48LXZdf_oL6voMcXxU/view

Requirements:
• Original artwork and original characters
• No AI-generated artwork or AI-generated voices
• Hand-drawn/frame-by-frame animation
• Final delivery in 1080p (or higher) MP4
• Source/project files upon completion

Please include in your proposal:
1. Your price for:
   - 15–30 second short
   - 1-minute animation
   - 5-minute episode
2. Estimated turnaround time
3. Software you use (Toon Boom, TVPaint, Adobe Animate, Krita, etc.)
4. Portfolio with similar animation work
5. Whether you work individually or as a team

This is intended to be a long-term project, so I'm looking for someone reliable who can consistently deliver high-quality work over

title: Senior Transmission Planning Engineer Required
desc:
Senior Transmission Planning Engineer
Remote
About the Role
We are seeking a motivated, entrepreneurial engineering professional to perform transmission planning studies and analysis to support operations, business growth, and team growth.
This hybrid role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment and can wear multiple hats.
Key Responsibilities

Manage different consulting engagements related to power system studies for transmission interconnection projects
Provide guidance and oversight to junior engineers performing power system modeling and analysis
Participate in business development including identification of new work, preparation of proposals, providing input on project scope, approach, schedule, and budget
Develop and maintain up-to-date knowledge of industry technology and applications of new technologies
Qualifications

Bachelor's Degree in Electrical Engineering or sufficient industry experience is considered in lieu of advanced degree
Associate: 5+ years of relevant engineering experience
Senior: 7+ years of relevant engineering experience
Lead: 10+ years of relevant engineering experience
Experience and interest in load flow and contingency analysis to identify transmission thermal and voltage constraints as well as to identify transfer capability limits
Experience using transmission planning software for load flow modeling, contingency analysis, and stability analysis (PSS/E, PSLF, TARA)
Strong communication, networking, and relationship-buil

title: Panduan Pendapatan Digital Marketing
desc:
Saya ingin mempelajari cara memperoleh penghasilan dari pekerjaan online, tepatnya melalui digital marketing. Saya membutuhkan bantuan satu freelancer yang mampu:

• Merumuskan strategi digital marketing praktis yang benar-benar bisa menghasilkan uang—mulai dari channel apa yang paling cepat dipakai (affiliate, kampanye klien, iklan berbayar, konten monetisasi), sampai perkiraan waktu hasil terlihat.  
• Menyusun langkah tindak lanjut harian, mingguan, dan bulanan agar saya tahu persis apa yang harus dikerjakan.  
• Membangun sistem penjadwalan sederhana: kalender kerja lengkap dengan pengingat otomatis menggunakan Google Calendar, Trello, atau Asana sehingga eksekusi strategi tetap konsisten.

Hasil yang saya harapkan:  
1. Dokumen strategi digital marketing terstruktur (PDF atau Google Docs).  
2. Template kalender/kanban siap pakai untuk penjadwalan.  
3. Satu sesi tanya jawab singkat (chat atau call) guna memastikan saya memahami seluruh proses.

Utamakan freelancer yang telah sukses menghasilkan income nyata lewat digital marketing dan terbiasa menata workflow. Saya menilai pekerjaan selesai ketika strategi dan alat penjadwalan sudah dapat langsung saya jalankan.

title: Bantuan Cari Kerja Pentadbiran
desc:
Saya sedang berusaha mendapatkan pekerjaan sepenuh masa dalam bidang Administration dan memerlukan bantuan profesional untuk mempercepatkan proses ini. Keutamaan saya ialah:

• Menyemak dan menambah baik CV/resumé serta surat permohonan supaya lebih menonjol kepada majikan.  
• Mengenal pasti serta menyenaraikan peluang kerja relevan (job matching) yang sesuai dengan pengalaman dan kelayakan saya.  
• Memberi panduan penulisan profil LinkedIn dan platform kerjaya lain.  
• Menyediakan latihan atau skrip persediaan temuduga, termasuk simulasi soal jawab.  
• Memberi nasihat tentang strategi permohonan—contohnya jadual penghantaran, kata kunci ATS, dan susulan e-mel.

Hasil kerja yang saya jangka terima:  
1. Versi terkini CV dan surat permohonan siap untuk dihantar.  
2. Senarai minimum 15 jawatan pentadbiran sepenuh masa di lokasi atau jarak kerja yang dipersetujui.  
3. Nota panduan atau rakaman ringkas sesi persediaan temuduga.  
4. Cadangan penambahbaikan profil LinkedIn (jika berkaitan).

Saya terbuka menggunakan alat seperti Microsoft Word, Google Docs, atau Canva, asalkan hasilnya kemas dan mudah disunting. Beritahu pengalaman anda membantu pencari kerja sebelum ini, tempoh masa yang diperlukan, dan apa lagi yang boleh anda tawarkan untuk meningkatkan peluang saya diterima bekerja.

title: High-Performance Roofing Leads Specialist Needed
desc:
I own a roofing company that focuses on roof restoration and rejuvenation services. Looking for someone with proven success generating roofing leads targeting homeowners dealing with roof aging, leaks, or tight budgets.

- Must have verifiable experience with lead-gen campaigns that consistently bring intent-driven inquiries and produce ROI within platforms like Facebook Ads & Google Ads.  
- Share past successes (with metrics if possible). Scope includes crafting persuasive messaging, campaign execution, and funnel optimization with transparent performance reporting.

title: Proven Lead Generation Expert for Exterior Cleaning Services
desc:
Seeking an experienced digital marketer who specializes in softwash and pressure cleaning lead-gen campaigns. Proven expertise in running high-quality campaigns on Facebook Ads & Google Ads is a must. 

- Requirement: Share case studies or past campaign results demonstrating success in generating high-intent leads.  
- Scope includes strategic ad setup, sharp audience targeting, compelling ad creatives, and ongoing campaign optimization to ensure cost-effective and high-quality conversions. No results-driven experience? No need to apply.

title: Melek Yatırımcı Davet Organizasyonu
desc:
Melek yatırımcılara yönelik özel bir networking etkinliği düzenliyorum ve sürecin tüm davet, tanıtım ve koordinasyon adımlarında destek arıyorum. Amacım, şirketimi tanıtabileceğim samimi bir ortam yaratmak ve etkinliğe yalnızca nitelikli yatırımcıların katılımını sağlamak.

İhtiyaçlarım
• Hedef liste oluşturma: Melek yatırımcı veritabanlarının taranması, LinkedIn ve sektörel ağlar üzerinden uygun profillerin belirlenmesi.    
• Raporlama: Kaç yatırımcıya ulaşıldığı, geri dönüş oranları ve teyitli katılımcı listesi.

Beklentiler
– Türkçe ve İngilizce akıcı yazım.  
– Gmail, Mailchimp veya benzeri e-posta otomasyon araçlarında deneyim.  
– LinkedIn Sales Navigator ya da eşdeğer araçlarla araştırma becerisi.  
– KVKK ve GDPR uyumuna dikkat.

Teslimat
1. Hedef yatırımcı listesi (Excel veya Google Sheet).  
2. Onaylı davet ve takip şablonları (Word veya Google Doc).  
3. İletişim temposunu gösteren takvim (PDF veya takvim paylaşımı).  
4. Etkinlik taslak programı.  
5. Nihai rapor ve katılımcı listesi.

Kısa sürede organize olabilecek, iletişimi güçlü bir profesyonelle çalışmak istiyorum.

title: Online Patient Assistance Counselor
desc:
I run a small online Patient Assistance Department that offers discreet help to men who find themselves in difficult emotional situations. Twice a week—each session lasting about an hour—you and I will meet our clients on live video. Your role is to guide them toward a simple, workable next step by drawing on professional psychological experience and, above all, well-chosen motivational and inspiring words.

Here is what I need from you:
• You identify as female and feel comfortable bringing kindness and courage to delicate conversations.
• You speak clear, confident English.
• You have a reliable device with camera and microphone so the client sees a friendly face and hears a steady voice.
• Platform is in the Telegram.

Each engagement pays $180 per hour. After every call, please send me a short written summary (a few lines are fine) so I can track progress and schedule any follow-up. Confidentiality is mandatory; clients must feel completely safe opening up.

If you are ready to combine professional support skills with a gentle, uplifting approach, I would love to work with you.

title: Complete HR Document Revamp
desc:
I need a seasoned HR professional to give our entire suite of people-management documents a thorough makeover and ensure everything is legally compliant, clearly written, and consistent with current best practice.

Scope of work  
• Employee Handbook – create a fresh, user-friendly manual that covers Company Policies, Code of Conduct, and a robust Remote-Work section. It must align with local labour legislation and reflect our culture.  
• Job Descriptions – rewrite or draft roles so that responsibilities, reporting lines, and KPIs are crystal-clear.  
• HR Policies – standardise leave, performance management, grievance, and any other core policies we may have missed.  
• Contract Letters (independent-contractor agreement) – tighten the language, insert the right clauses, and confirm compliance.  
• Non-Disclosure Agreement – review for enforceability and plain-English clarity.  
• Job Adverts – craft engaging, inclusive postings that mirror each updated job description.

What success looks like  
1. All documents are internally consistent, legally sound, and ready for immediate use.  
2. Tone is professional but approachable, matching a modern, forward-thinking company.  
3. Final files delivered in editable Word format; handbook also supplied as a polished PDF with table of contents.

If your background includes SHRM-aligned policy writing, employment-law familiarity, and a knack for clear, concise wording, I’d like to hear how you would tackle this project and your estimat

title: Unfair Dismissal Legal Expert ( only in spain!!!!)
desc:
I'm seeking a Spanish labor law expert to assist with an unfair dismissal case. Currently, I'm at the initial consultation stage.

Dear team,
I am seeking a quote for legal assistance with my dismissal. Summary of my situation:
Employment and dismissal


I was given 3 business days to sign the settlement agreement. I have not signed anything. I have requested all documents in PDF and my payslips.
I have doubts about the validity of the stated objective grounds (no redeployment/alternative roles were considered) and want the dismissal challenged as improcedente.

Related issue: Social Security registration discrepancy

My employment does not appear correctly registered with the TGSS (possible wrong affiliation number — I provided my number ending 818082 before starting). This puts my unemployment benefit claim at risk. The employer's payroll team is "investigating."
I also have insurance periods in Germany and Portugal (PD U1 requests already in progress by me).

Deadlines

Papeleta de conciliación: 20 working days from 07/07/2026 (≈4 August).
SAE registration booked 17/07; SEPE application due ≈28 July (I handle these myself, plus the TGSS correction).

What I need a quote for:

Drafting the papeleta de conciliación (claiming improcedencia and all amounts owed), including review of the dismissal letter, settlement agreement, severance calculation and finiquito.
Attendance/representation at the conciliation hearing before the CMAC.
(Optional, please quote separately) Drafting

title: Chronic Pain Explainer Video
desc:
I have a 1,000-word article that breaks down— in plain language—why the brain and nerves can keep amplifying pain signals long after an injury has healed. I now need that text turned into a concise, YouTube-ready video that feels informative and educational from start to finish.

Here’s what matters to me:  
• Visuals should combine clear text overlays and easy-to-grasp infographics. I’d also love to pepper in a handful of still images inspired by Keith Haring’s bold, outline-driven style to keep things lively and memorable.  
• A natural-sounding, professional voiceover must guide viewers through the story; I’ll supply the base script, but I’m happy for you to polish it so it flows well with the visuals.  
• Overall tone: reassuring, science-based, never sensational. Think of it as an animated mini-lecture that helps chronic-pain sufferers understand their own bodies.  

Deliverables  
• One finished HD video file (ready for direct upload to YouTube)  
• Separate audio track of the voiceover  
• Source project files and any custom graphics so I can tweak or subtitle later  

If you’re comfortable blending simple motion graphics with clear narration and Keith Haring-inspired imagery, let’s discuss timing and any extra assets you might need from me.
